TweakWhy_AccountProtectionWarn: Tšhireletšo ya Windows e bontšha temošo ge e le gore ga se wa tsena ka akhaonto ya Microsoft. Go šitiša go uta tsebišo ye yeo e ipoeletšago.
TweakWhy_ActiveHours: E hlaloša nako yeo Windows e ka se thomego PC ya gago gape ka go iketla go fetša go tsenya diapdeite.
TweakWhy_ActivityHistory: E rekota mošomo wa gago go ralala le didirišwa ge o saennwe ka gare ga akhaonto ya Microsoft gomme e ka e nyalantšha le leru. Go šitiša go boloka mošomo wa selegae.
TweakWhy_AdminApprovalMode: Controls how User Account Control behaves when an app requests elevated privileges. Kakaretšo prompts for consent, Never disables UAC prompts. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_AdobeNetworkBlock: E tlaleletša melawana ya firewall go thibela dikgopelo tša Adobe go tsena inthaneteng. Se se ama netefatšo ya laesense, go nyalantšha leru, le dikarolo tša Leru la Boitlhamelo. Ye ke phetogo yeo e lego kotsing e kgolo yeo e ka bago thata goba go sa kgonege go e bušetša morago.
TweakWhy_AdvancedStartupShortcut: E hlola tsela ye kopana ya komporong yeo e thomago PC gape ka pela ka gare ga thepo ya Dikgetho tša go Thoma tša Maemo a Godimo (Tikologo ya Tsošološo ya Windows).
TweakWhy_AdvertisingID: Windows e abela ID ya moswananoši ya papatšo go akhaonto ya gago yeo didirišwa di ka e šomišago go bontšha dipapatšo tše di nepišitšwego. Go šitiša go emiša go latela mo.
TweakWhy_AeroShaking: Shaking a window title bar minimizes all other open windows. Go emela if you find this triggers by accident during normal use.
TweakWhy_AppColorMode: Sets the default color mode that applications use when they respect the system setting: Lepelo or Khanya.
TweakWhy_AppsLanguageSwitch: E dumelela Windows go gopola le go fetogela go polelo ya tsenyo ye e fapanego goba peakanyo ya khiiboto ka lefasetere la tirišo.
TweakWhy_AppsSilentInstalling: Windows e ka tsenya didirišwa tše di šišintšwego ka setu ka morago ntle le go go botšiša. Go šitiša go emiša boitshwaro bjo. Phetogo ye e rwele kotsi ye e lekanetšego gomme e ka ama ditshepedišo tše dingwe tša mošomo.
TweakWhy_AppsSmartScreen: SmartScreen e hlahloba difaele tše di taoneloutšwago le didirišwa kgahlanong le polokelo ya tshedimošo ya botumo bja leru gomme e go lemoša pele e sepetša diphethagatšo tše di sa tsebjego. Phetogo ye e rwele kotsi ye e lekanetšego gomme e ka ama ditshepedišo tše dingwe tša mošomo.
TweakWhy_AutoRebootOnCrash: Ge Windows e thulana (skrine se se pududu), e ka thoma gape ka go iketla. Go šitiša go boloka phošo sekirining gore o kgone go bala khoutu ya go emiša.
TweakWhy_Autoplay: E laola ge e ba Windows e bula ka go iketla kgopelo goba e thoma tirišo ge o tsenya USB drive goba methopo ye mengwe ya ditaba yeo e ka tlošwago.
TweakWhy_BSoDStopError: Go Ledilengs the specific error code on the blue screen of death instead of just the generic sad face emoji.
TweakWhy_BackgroundApps: E laola ge eba didirišwa di dumeletšwe go šoma le go mpshafatša ka morago ge di se tsepame. Go šitiša go boloka CPU le memori. Ye ke phetogo yeo e lego kotsing e kgolo yeo e ka bago thata goba go sa kgonege go e bušetša morago.
TweakWhy_BingSearch: Lepokisi la nyakišišo la Menu ya go Thoma le ka bontšha dipoelo tša wepe tša Bing go bapa le dipoelo tša selegae. Go šitiša go boloka nyakišišo ya Menu ya go Thoma ya selegae fela.
TweakWhy_BootRecovery: E laola ge e ba Windows e tsena ka go iketla mokgweng wa go tsošološa ka morago ga maiteko a go thoma ao a paletšwego ka go latelana. Phetogo ye e rwele kotsi ye e lekanetšego gomme e ka ama ditshepedišo tše dingwe tša mošomo.
TweakWhy_BraveDebloat: Go emelas Brave browser's optional extras: rewards, crypto wallet, VPN, and AI chat. Go Bulosiwaly affects these Brave-specific features, not your browsing. This is a high-risk change that may be difficult or impossible to reverse.
TweakWhy_BuildNumberOnDesktop: Bontšha nomoro ya go aga ya Windows le kgatišo bjalo ka leswao la meetse sekhutlong sa ka fase sa le letona sa komporong ya gago.
TweakWhy_CABInstallContext: Adds an Go notša option to the right-click context menu for .cab archive files.
TweakWhy_CIMemoryIntegrity: Botshepegi bja khoutu bjo bo šireleditšwego ke hypervisor bo sepetša khoutu ya kernel ya Windows tikologong ya go bonagala go thibela malware ya maemo a kernel le di-rootkit. Phetogo ye e rwele kotsi ye e lekanetšego gomme e ka ama ditshepedišo tše dingwe tša mošomo.
TweakWhy_Camera: Master toggle go laola ge e ba didirišwa di ka kgopela phihlelelo go khamera ya gago. Go šitiša go thibela didirišwa ka moka go šomiša khamera. Phetogo ye e rwele kotsi ye e lekanetšego gomme e ka ama ditshepedišo tše dingwe tša mošomo.
TweakWhy_CapsLock: E laola ge eba senotlelo sa Caps Lock se kgontšhitšwe. Go šitiša go beakanya gape senotlelo sa Caps Lock ka fao go e tobetša ga go dire selo.
TweakWhy_ChangingSoundScheme: E laola ge eba badiriši ba ka fetoša sekema sa modumo sa Windows. Go šitiša se go notlela sekema sa bjale gomme go thibela diphetogo.
TweakWhy_CheckBoxes: Go Ledilengs small checkboxes next to files and folders in Explorer to make it easier to select multiple items without holding Ctrl.
TweakWhy_CheckWinGet: WinGet ke molaodi wa sephuthelwana wa Windows wo o agetšwego ka gare wo o šomišwago go tsenya le go mpshafatša didirišwa go tšwa mothalong wa taelo. Se se netefatša gore e hlomilwe ebile e le nakong.
TweakWhy_ClearRecentFiles: Ka go itiriša e hlatswa lenaneo la difaele tša morago bjale nako le nako ge o tšwa. E kaonafatša sephiri go metšhene ye e abelanwago goba ya badiriši ba bantši.
TweakWhy_ClipboardHistory: Stores a history of copied items so you can paste from previous clips using Win+V. Go nolosetša to turn this feature on.
TweakWhy_CompressedFolderNewContext: Go Ledilengs or hides the Compressed (zipped) Folder option in the right-click New submenu in File Explorer.
TweakWhy_ConnectionSharing: E dumelela PC ye go abelana kgokagano ya yona ya inthanete le didirišwa tše dingwe, e šoma bjalo ka lefelo la go fiša la softwere. Go kgontšha go bontšha kgetho ye ka dipeakanyong tša netweke. Phetogo ye e rwele kotsi ye e lekanetšego gomme e ka ama ditshepedišo tše dingwe tša mošomo.
TweakWhy_ControlPanelView: E beakanya setaele sa pontšho sa maitirelo sa Phanele ya Taolo go Diaekhone tše Kgolo, Diaekhone tše Nnyane, goba go hlopha ga Legoro la maitirelo.
TweakWhy_Copilot: Tloša Copilot, Gopola, le dikarolo ka moka tše di amanago le Windows AI. Go tsenya gape go nyaka phihlelelo ya winget goba Microsoft Store.
TweakWhy_CortanaAutostart: E thibela Cortana go thoma ka go itiriša ge e thoma. Cortana e sa dutše e ka bulwa ka seatla ge e ba go nyakega.
TweakWhy_CreateRestorePoint: E hlola ntlha ya Tsošološo ya Tshepedišo ya Windows gore o kgone go bušetša morago diphetogo tša tshepedišo ge selo se sengwe se sa sepele gabotse. Kgothaletswa pele matha tweaks efe kapa efe.
TweakWhy_CrossDeviceResume: Lets you resume tasks from other Windows devices on this PC via a notification pop-up. Go emela if you do not use this cross-device feature.
TweakWhy_CurrentNetwork: E beakanya profaele ya netweke ya kgokagano ya gago ye e šomago gabjale. Poraefete kgontšha go utolla netweke le go abelana, Setšhaba se e thibela. Phetogo ye e rwele kotsi ye e lekanetšego gomme e ka ama ditshepedišo tše dingwe tša mošomo.
TweakWhy_DEPOptOut: E beakanya Thibelo ya Phethagatšo ya Datha go mokgwa wa go Kgetha, e kgontšha tšhireletšo ya DEP ya ditshepedišo ka moka ntle le tšeo o di kgaphelago ka ntle ka go lebanya. Phetogo ye e rwele kotsi ye e lekanetšego gomme e ka ama ditshepedišo tše dingwe tša mošomo.
TweakWhy_DNSoverHTTPS: Encrypts DNS lookups ka go di romela ka HTTPS go e na le UDP e sa hlakahlakanego. E thibela ISP ya gago goba netiweke go hlokomela goba go šitiša sephethephethe sa DNS. Phetogo ye e rwele kotsi ye e lekanetšego gomme e ka ama ditshepedišo tše dingwe tša mošomo.
TweakWhy_DefaultTerminalApp: E beakanya gore ke tirišo efe ya theminali yeo e bulegago ge o thoma Tšhišinyo ya Taelo goba PowerShell go tšwa ka gare ga Windows.
TweakWhy_DefenderAppGuard: E bula dithepo tša sephephediši sa Edge ka motšheneng wa go bonagala wo o arogilego go thibela diwepesaete tše kotsi go fihlelela tshepedišo ya moamogedi goba difaele tša yona. Phetogo ye e rwele kotsi ye e lekanetšego gomme e ka ama ditshepedišo tše dingwe tša mošomo.
TweakWhy_DefenderCloud: Go nolosetšas Microsoft Defender's cloud-based protection for real-time threat lookups using Microsoft's global threat intelligence database. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_DefenderSandbox: E sepetša entšene ya antivirus ya Microsoft Defender ka gare ga tshepedišo ya lepokisi la mohlaba leo le arogilego bakeng sa tšhireletšo e oketšegilego. E tlaleletša ka tshepedišo ye nnyane ya godimo. Phetogo ye e rwele kotsi ye e lekanetšego gomme e ka ama ditshepedišo tše dingwe tša mošomo.
TweakWhy_DefenderTrayIcon: Go Ledilengs or hides the Windows Security (Defender) icon in the system tray. Hiding it does not disable Defender protection.
TweakWhy_DeliveryOptimization: Windows e ka šomiša PC ya gago go abelana ka datha ya go taonelouta ya Windows Update le di-PC tše dingwe mo netiweke ya gago goba inthaneteng. Go šitiša go boloka di-download tša gago e le tša sephiri. Phetogo ye e rwele kotsi ye e lekanetšego gomme e ka ama ditshepedišo tše dingwe tša mošomo.
TweakWhy_DiagTrackService: Tirelo ya DiagTrack e kgoboketša le go tsenya datha ya tšhomišo ya Windows le ya tlhahlobo go di-server tša Microsoft. Go e šitiša go emiša go tsenywa ga telemetry ya ka morago. Phetogo ye e rwele kotsi ye e lekanetšego gomme e ka ama ditshepedišo tše dingwe tša mošomo.
TweakWhy_DiagnosticDataLevel: E laola gore ke datha ye kaakang ya tlhahlobo yeo Windows e e romelago go Microsoft. Minimal romela feela motheo sesebediswa info le ya data tšepahala.
TweakWhy_DisableAESCiphers: Go emelas older weak AES cipher entries in the Windows SCHANNEL security layer. Forces applications to negotiate stronger cipher configurations. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_DisableAutoRun: E thibela Windows go sepetša mananeo ka go iketla go di-USB drive le methopo e mengwe ya ditaba yeo e ka tlošwago. Emisa e tloaelehileng malware phatlalatsa vector.
TweakWhy_DisableHashAlgorithms: Configures SCHANNEL hash algorithm settings. Go emelas MD5 and enables SHA family algorithms for stronger integrity verification. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_DisableIPv6: Go emelas the IPv6 protocol stack system-wide. Go ba lonolotswe if your network does not use IPv6 to reduce unnecessary attack surface. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_DisableRC2RC4Ciphers: Go emelas RC2 and RC4 ciphers in SCHANNEL. These algorithms are cryptographically broken and should not be used in any TLS connection. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_DisableRemoteCommands: DCOM ke protocol ya go tsenya tirišong ya kgole yeo e nyakegago ke didirišwa tša taolo ya kgwebo (SCCM, WMI). Go e šitiša go fokotša bokagodimo bja tlhaselo eupša go ka thuba ditshepedišo tša mošomo tša taolo ya kgole.
TweakWhy_DisableSMBv3Compression: Turns off SMB compression to protect against CVE-2020-0796. Go Bulosiwaly affects SMB traffic compression, not file access speed. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_DisableTCPTimestamps: Tloša tshedimošo ya setempe sa nako sa TCP go tšwa go diphasele tša netweke. E thibela ditshepedišo tša kgole go gatiša menwana ya OS ya gago go ya ka nako ya go šoma. Phetogo ye e rwele kotsi ye e lekanetšego gomme e ka ama ditshepedišo tše dingwe tša mošomo.
TweakWhy_DisableTripleDESCipher: Go emelas Triple DES (3DES) in SCHANNEL. 3DES is vulnerable to SWEET32 birthday attacks and is no longer considered secure. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_DiskCleanup: E sepetša sedirišwa sa Windows Disk Cleanup seo se agetšwego ka gare go tloša difaele tša nakwana, cache ya tshepedišo, le datha ye nngwe ye e sa nyakegego go lokolla sekgoba sa disk. Phetogo ye e rwele kotsi ye e lekanetšego gomme e ka ama ditshepedišo tše dingwe tša mošomo.
TweakWhy_DismissMSAccount: Tloša kgopelo ye e ipoeletšago ka go Tšhireletšo ya Windows yeo e go kgopelago go tsena ka akhaonto ya Microsoft bakeng sa tšhireletšo ya tlaleletšo.
TweakWhy_DismissSmartScreenFilter: Tloša kgopelo ye e ipoeletšago ka go Tšhireletšo ya Windows yeo e go kgopelago go kgontšha sefa ya botumo bja SmartScreen.
TweakWhy_DownloadBlocking: E laola ge e ba Tšhireletšo ya Windows e swaya difaele tše di taoneloutšwago bjalo ka tšeo di ka bago di sa bolokega ka go šomiša moela wa datha wo mongwe wa Zone.Identifier.
TweakWhy_EdgeDebloat: E diriša dipeakanyo tša Pholisi ya Sehlopha go šitiša telemetry, mothuši wa mabenkele, dikgoboketšo, bara ya ka thoko ya Copilot, le dilo tše dingwe tša tlaleletšo tša Edge tša boikgethelo. Ye ke phetogo yeo e lego kotsing e kgolo yeo e ka bago thata goba go sa kgonege go e bušetša morago.
TweakWhy_EditWithClipchampContext: Go Ledilengs or hides the Edit with Clipchamp video editor option in the right-click context menu for video files.
TweakWhy_EditWithPaintContext: Go Ledilengs or hides the Edit with Paint option in the right-click context menu for image files.
TweakWhy_EditWithPhotosContext: Go Ledilengs or hides the Edit with Photos option in the right-click context menu for image files.
TweakWhy_EnableBiometricsAntiSpoofing: Go nolosetšas enhanced anti-spoofing for Windows Hello facial recognition. Go Bulosiwaly applies if you have compatible biometric hardware.
TweakWhy_EnableSMBGuestCompatibility: E dumelela dikgokagano tša SMB go dishere tša netweke ntle le go nyaka netefatšo. E nyakega bakeng sa go fihlelela didirišwa tša kgale tša NAS, di-printer goba di-router. Phetogo ye e rwele kotsi ye e lekanetšego gomme e ka ama ditshepedišo tše dingwe tša mošomo.
TweakWhy_EncCompFilesColor: Go Ledilengs encrypted files in green and compressed files in blue in File Explorer. Makes these file types immediately identifiable.
TweakWhy_EnhPointerPrecision: Mouse acceleration that adjusts cursor speed based on how fast you physically move the mouse. Go emela for consistent raw mouse input, recommended for gaming.
TweakWhy_ErrorReporting: Ge tirišo e thula, Windows Error Reporting e ka romela pego go Microsoft. Go šitiša go emiša datha ye go tloga motšheneng wa gago.
TweakWhy_EventViewerCustomView: Hlama tebelelo ya tlwaelo ka go Sebopego sa Ditiragalo ye e sefilwego go bontšha ditiragalo tša tlholo ya tshepedišo, go dira gore go be bonolo go hlahloba gore ke mananeo afe ao a thakgotšwego.
TweakWhy_ExplorerAutoDiscovery: Mohlahlobi wa Faele o lemoga mohuta wa diteng tša foltara ye nngwe le ye nngwe gomme o diriša thempleite ya tebelelo ye e swanago. Go šitiša go notlela difoldara ka moka go tebelelo ya kakaretšo ye e sa fetogego.
TweakWhy_ExplorerTitleFullPath: Go Ledilengs the complete folder path in the File Explorer title bar instead of just the folder name. Useful when working with many folders of the same name.
TweakWhy_F1HelpPage: Go tobetša F1 ka go File Explorer goba godimo ga komporong go bula weposaete ya thušo ya Windows ka go sephephediši sa gago. Go šitiša go thibela go tsebagatšwa mo ga sephephediši.
TweakWhy_F8BootMenu: Go nolosetšas the legacy F8 key boot menu that lets you select Safe Mode and other startup options during the Windows boot process.
TweakWhy_FastStartup: Mokgwa wa go tima wa motswako wo o bolokago mmušo wa kernel go tiske ka fao Windows e thoma ka lebelo. E ka baka ditaba ka dipeakanyo tša go thoma gabedi goba go tima ka botlalo.
TweakWhy_FeedbackFrequency: E laola gore Windows e go kgopela gakae go lekanyetša maitemogelo a gago goba go romela ditshwaotshwao. Go beakanya go Le ka mohla go emiša ditšhišinyo ka moka tša ditshwayotshwayo.
TweakWhy_FileDeleteConfirm: Go Ledilengs a confirmation dialog before permanently deleting a file. Go nolosetša to get a prompt before files are sent to the Recycle Bin.
TweakWhy_FileExplorerCompactMode: E fokotša sekgoba magareng ga diaetheme ka go File Explorer bakeng sa tebelelo ya lenaneo ye e kitimago, ye e humilego ka tshedimošo ye ntši.
TweakWhy_FileExtensions: Go Ledilengs the file extension (e.g. .txt, .exe) after every filename in Explorer. Helps identify what type a file is at a glance.
TweakWhy_FileOperationsDetails: Go Ledilengs the detailed progress dialog for file operations (copy, move, delete) by default instead of the minimal progress bar.
TweakWhy_FileTransferDialog: E laola ge eba poledišano ya khopi ya faele le go šuthiša e bontšha dintlha ka botlalo go swana le lebelo le nako ye e šetšego ka go ikemela.
TweakWhy_Firewall: Go nolosetšas or disables Windows Defender Firewall across all network profiles. Disabling leaves all inbound ports completely unfiltered. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_FirstLogonAnimation: Go Ledilengs a brief welcome animation and the Hi screen the first time you sign in after a major Windows update.
TweakWhy_FldrSeparateProcess: E bula lefasetere le lengwe le le lengwe la foltara ya Explorer ka tshepedišo ya yona. Ge e ba e nngwe e thula, tše dingwe di dula di bulegile. E šomiša memori ye ntši go se nene.
TweakWhy_FolderGroupBy: E laola ge eba difaele ka go foltara ya Ditaoneloute di hlophilwe ka letšatšikgwedi leo le fetotšwego. Go beakanya go Ga go na go bontšha difaele ka moka lenaneong la sephaphathi.
TweakWhy_FullscreenOptimizations: Sebopego sa Windows seo se kaonafatšago dipapadi le didirišwa tšeo di šomago ka mokgwa wa skrine se se tletšego bakeng sa tshepedišo ye kaone. Go šitiša go ka lokiša ditaba tša go sepelelana dipapading tše dingwe tša kgale.
TweakWhy_GPUScheduling: Hardware-akgofiša GPU kemiso e dumelela GPU go laola memori ya yona ya bidio ka go lebanya, yeo e ka fokotšago go khutša ga tsenyo dipapading.
TweakWhy_GameDVR: Go rekota ga morago go tšwela pele go swara papadi gore o kgone go boloka metsotso ye mmalwa ya mafelelo ka morago ga ge selo se sengwe se diregile. Go šitiša go lokolla methopo ya GPU le tiske bakeng sa go se fetoge ga FPS mo go kaone.
TweakWhy_Hibernation: Boloka dikahare tsohle tsa RAM ho tiske le matlafatsa PC tima ka ho feletseng. Faele ya boroko bja marega e ka šomiša di-gigabyte tše mmalwa tša sebaka sa tiske.
TweakWhy_HiddenItems: Go Ledilengs files and folders that are marked as hidden in File Explorer. Hidden items appear slightly transparent when visible.
TweakWhy_HomeGroups: Dihlopha tša Gae e be e le tšobotsi ya Windows ya go abelana difaele magareng ga di-PC tša ka gae. E tlošitšwe ka go Windows 10 1803 eupša ditirelo tša mašaledi di ka ba di sa le gona.
TweakWhy_ImportExploitProtectionPolicy: E taonelouta le go tsenya faele ya pholisi ya phokotšo ya go šomiša yeo e agilwego pele ka gare ga Windows Defender Exploit Guard, e diriša diphokotšo tša tshepedišo ya tlwaelo. Ye ke phetogo yeo e lego kotsing e kgolo yeo e ka bago thata goba go sa kgonege go e bušetša morago.
TweakWhy_InputMethod: E beakanya mokgwa wa go tsenya khiiboto wa go se fetoge wo Windows e o šomišago. Seisemane se gapeletša peakanyo ya Seisemane go sa šetšwe maleme a mangwe ao a hlomilwego.
TweakWhy_JPEGWallpapersQuality: Windows e gatelela di-wallpaper tša JPEG ge e di beakanya bjalo ka bokamorago bja komporong. Go beakanya go Max go boloka boleng bja seswantšho ka botlalo.
TweakWhy_LLMNR: Link-Local Multicast Name Tharollo e rarolla maina a baamogedi ba dinetweke tša selegae. E ka šomišwa ka ditlhaselo tša go thopa mangwalo a tumelelo gomme e golofaditšwe gabotse. Phetogo ye e rwele kotsi ye e lekanetšego gomme e ka ama ditshepedišo tše dingwe tša mošomo.
TweakWhy_LanguageListAccess: Allows websites to read your Windows language preference list to tailor content. Go emela to prevent websites from detecting your language settings.
TweakWhy_LanmanWorkstationGuestAuthPolic: Guest authentication for SMB is a known lateral-movement vector disabled by default since Windows 10 1709. Enabling it exposes the system to unauthenticated SMB access. Go Bulosiwaly enable for legacy device compatibility.
TweakWhy_LatestInstalled.NET: E gapeletša dikgopelo tša 32-bit le 64-bit go šomiša phetolelo ye mpsha ye e hlomilwego ya nako ya go sepela ya .NET go e na le phetolelo yeo di bego di agilwe kgahlanong le yona mathomong.
TweakWhy_LocalSecurityAuthority: Runs the Windows LSA process in protected mode to prevent credential theft by tools like Mimikatz. Go ba lonolotswe for all systems. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_LocationService: E laola ge e ba didirišwa di ka fihlelela lefelo la thutafase la sedirišwa sa gago. Go šitiša go thibela go latela lefelo ke didirišwa ka moka. Phetogo ye e rwele kotsi ye e lekanetšego gomme e ka ama ditshepedišo tše dingwe tša mošomo.
TweakWhy_LockScreen: E laola ge eba skrine sa go notlela sa Windows se bontšhwa pele ga skrine sa go tsena go Windows 11.
TweakWhy_LockScreenBlur: E diriša seabe sa go fifala sa acrylic go bokamorago bja skrine sa go tsena. Go šitiša go bontšha bokamorago ntle le go fifala.
TweakWhy_LockScreenRS1: E laola ge eba skrine sa go notlela sa Windows se bontšhwa pele ga skrine sa go tsena go Windows 10 (tsela ya pholisi ya nako ya RS1).
TweakWhy_LockWidgets: Sephuthelwana sa Maitemogelo a Wepe sa Windows se tlaleletša ka didirišwa le diteng tše di fetogago go skrine sa go notlela le bara ya mošomo. Go šitiša go tloša tše.
TweakWhy_MSIExtractContext: E tlaleletša kgetho ya Ntšha go thepo ya seemo ya go klika ka gojeng ya difaele tša sehlomathiši sa .msi, e go dumelela go phetla dikagare tša tšona ntle le go sepetša sehlomathiši.
TweakWhy_MSNetClient: Moreki wa Microsoft Networks yo a dumelelago PC ye go fihlelela difaele le diprinthe tšeo di abelanwago ke dikhomphutha tše dingwe tša Windows mo netiweke. Phetogo ye e rwele kotsi ye e lekanetšego gomme e ka ama ditshepedišo tše dingwe tša mošomo.
TweakWhy_MaintenanceWakeUp: Windows e ka tsoša PC ya gago borokong bošego ka moka go sepetša mešomo ya tlhokomelo ya go itiriša. Go golofatša go thibela go tsoga mo go sa nyakegego bošego ka moka.
TweakWhy_MapUpdates: Windows Maps ka ka tsela e iketsang thowuni ntjhafatswa offline 'mapa ya data ka morao. Go šitiša go boloka bandwidth ge o sa šomiše tirišo ya Dimmapa.
TweakWhy_MeetNow: Kopana Bjale leswao lefelong la tsebišo
TweakWhy_MergeConflicts: Go Ledilengs a warning when merging folders that contain files with the same name. Go emela to silently overwrite files without a prompt.
TweakWhy_Microphone: Master toggle go laola ge e ba didirišwa di ka kgopela phihlelelo go maekrofouno ya gago. Go šitiša go thibela didirišwa ka moka go šomiša mic. Phetogo ye e rwele kotsi ye e lekanetšego gomme e ka ama ditshepedišo tše dingwe tša mošomo.
TweakWhy_MostUsedApps: Go Ledilengs your most frequently launched apps at the top of the Start Menu app list for quick access.
TweakWhy_MostUsedStartApps: Ditirišo tše ntši tše di šomišwago go Thoma
TweakWhy_MouseAcceleration: Ntlafatsa Pointer Go nepagala go lekanya motsamao wa toeba go ya ka lebelo. Go šitiša go fa tekanyo ya tsenyo ye tala ya 1:1 yeo e kgethilwego ke dibapadi tša FPS tša phadišano bakeng sa nepo ye e sa fetogego.
TweakWhy_MultiplaneOverlay: A GPU compositing tšobotsi hore ka ntlafatsa tshebetso. Go šitiša go ka lokiša diphošo tša pono goba go phadima ka dipeakanyong tše dingwe tša pontšho.
TweakWhy_MultipleInvokeContext: Ge o kgetha difaele tše 15 goba go feta gomme o klika ka gojeng, Windows ka tlwaelo e bontšha temošo pele e bontšha thepo ya seemo. Se se rotoša goba se tloša moedi woo.
TweakWhy_NCSIProbe: Sešupo sa Maemo a Kgokagano ya Neteweke se hlahloba kgokagano ka go ping di-server tša Microsoft. Go šitiša go ka bontšha diaekhone tša maemo a netweke ao a fošagetšego. Phetogo ye e rwele kotsi ye e lekanetšego gomme e ka ama ditshepedišo tše dingwe tša mošomo.
TweakWhy_NTFSLastAccess: E mpshafatša setempe sa nako go faele ye nngwe le ye nngwe nako le nako ge e balwa. Go šitiša go fokotša mošomo wa go ngwala tiske go ditshepedišo tšeo di nago le go bala ga faele ye ntši ye nnyane.
TweakWhy_NTFSLongPaths: Tlosa moedi wa ditlhaka tše 260 ditseleng tša faele. E nyakega bakeng sa didirišwa tše dingwe tša tlhabollo le dibopego tša foltara tšeo di tsentšwego ka gare ga sehlaga.
TweakWhy_NaglesAlgorithm: Reduces network buffering so packets are sent immediately. Can lower latency in competitive multiplayer, but may affect connection stability on some networks. Go emela if you notice connection drops.
TweakWhy_NavPaneAllFolders: Go Ledilengs all local folders including hidden system folders in the Explorer left navigation pane.
TweakWhy_NavPaneLibraries: Go Ledilengs the Libraries section (Documents, Music, Pictures, Videos) in the Explorer left navigation pane.
TweakWhy_NavigationPaneExpand: Lefasetešana la go sepelasepela la Explorer le atološwa ka go iketla le go sepelasepela go hlaola foltara ye o e lebelelago gabjale.
TweakWhy_NetBIOS: NetBIOS ke protocol ya kgale ya tharollo ya leina yeo e šomišwago bakeng sa go abelana ka faele ya Windows. Go šitiša go dinetweke tša sebjalebjale go fokotša sephethephethe sa kgašo seo se sa nyakegego. Phetogo ye e rwele kotsi ye e lekanetšego gomme e ka ama ditshepedišo tše dingwe tša mošomo.
TweakWhy_NetDevicesAutoInst: E laola ge e ba Windows e taonelouta le go tsenya di-driver tša didirišwa tša netweke tšeo di sa tšwago go kgokagana ka go iketla.
TweakWhy_NetworkAdaptersSavePower: E dumelela Windows go bea di-adaptara tša netweke boemong bja matla a tlase ge e sa šome. Go šitiša go thibela go diega ga kgokagano gape ka nako ye kopana ka morago ga ge adaptara e tsogile.
TweakWhy_NetworkDiscovery: Go nolosetšas this PC to find other devices on the local network and be visible to them. Required for browsing network shares in File Explorer. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_NetworkFromLockScreen: E laola ge eba konope ya kgetho ya netweke e bonagala skrineng sa go notlela pele ga ge modiriši a tsene.
TweakWhy_NetworkProtection: Tšhireletšo ya netweke ya Microsoft Defender e thibela dikgokagano go didomene tše kotsi tše di tsebjago le diaterese tša IP maemong a netweke. Phetogo ye e rwele kotsi ye e lekanetšego gomme e ka ama ditshepedišo tše dingwe tša mošomo.
TweakWhy_NewAppPrompt: Ge o leka go bula mohuta wa faele wo o sa amanago, Windows e bontšha poledišano yeo e botšišago gore o ka e bula bjang. Go šitiša go gatelela kgopelo ye.
TweakWhy_NewOutlook: Controls whether the new Outlook app is available. Go emela to keep using the classic Mail and Calendar apps instead.
TweakWhy_NewsInterests: Diteng le diteng tša boso godimo ga bara ya mošomo
TweakWhy_Notifications: Master switjha bakeng sa tsamaiso eohle ya tsebiso Windows. Go šitiša go emiša ditsebišo ka moka tša tirišo gomme go uta setsi sa tsebišo. Ye ke phetogo yeo e lego kotsing e kgolo yeo e ka bago thata goba go sa kgonege go e bušetša morago.
TweakWhy_NumLock: Controls whether the Num Lock key is automatically turned on when Windows starts. Go nolosetša to always start with the number pad active.
TweakWhy_OneDrive: E tsenya mothomi wa OneDrive wa desktop, goba e tloša sediriswa le dikopano tša sona tša Explorer. Go tloša go tsenya ke tshepedišo ya go tloša sephuthelwana, e sego kgoboko e bonolo — go e bušetša go ka nyaka gore o tlogediše mpshafatšo, o ngwale gape, gomme o eme gore tirelo e bušetše.
TweakWhy_OneDriveFileExplorerAd: OneDrive e bontšha kitsišo ya papatšo ka gare ga File Explorer e go hlohleletša gore o sync difaele. Go e uta go tloša seboto se.
TweakWhy_OpenFileExplorerTo: E beakanya lefelo la maitirelo leo Mohlohlomiši wa Faele a bulago go lona ge e thakgotšwe go tšwa go bara ya mošomo goba Menu ya Thoma.
TweakWhy_OpenWindowsTerminalAdminContext: Bula Windows Terminal bjalo ka molaodi ka go ikemela
TweakWhy_OpenWindowsTerminalContext: 'Bula ka go Windows Terminal' thepo ya seemo
TweakWhy_PUAppsDetection: Go nolosetšas Defender to detect and quarantine potentially unwanted applications such as adware, bundleware, and browser hijackers. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_PerformanceTuning: Matha sete ya lefa tsamaiso optimizations le boot phetolo dipeakanyo ho ntlafatsa kakaretso tsamaiso karabelo. Phetogo ye e rwele kotsi ye e lekanetšego gomme e ka ama ditshepedišo tše dingwe tša mošomo.
TweakWhy_PowerPlan: Sets the Windows power plan. Balanced scales performance based on load. Phaposit Performance keeps the CPU at full speed. Ultimate Performance removes all power-saving throttling for maximum throughput. Ultimate Performance may not be available on all systems.
TweakWhy_PowerShellModulesLogging: E loga taelo ye nngwe le ye nngwe yeo e sepedišwago ke dimmojule tša PowerShell go log ya tiragalo ya Windows. E na le mohola bakeng sa go hlahloba dipuku tša tšhireletšo le go nyakišiša ditiragalo.
TweakWhy_PowerShellScriptsLogging: E loga diteng ka botlalo tša boloko ye nngwe le ye nngwe ya sengwalwa sa PowerShell yeo e phethagatšago go log ya tiragalo ya Windows. E thuša ka dinyakišišo tša ka morago ga ditiragalo.
TweakWhy_Powershell7Telemetry: PowerShell 7 sends anonymous usage data to Microsoft by default. Disabling opts out of this telemetry. Linked to the Go notša/Update PowerShell 7 option.
TweakWhy_PreventEdgeShortcutCreation: E emiša Microsoft Edge go bopa gape tsela ye kopana ya yona ya komporong ka morago ga diapdeite. E šoma go dikanale ka moka tša go lokollwa ga Edge.
TweakWhy_PrintCMDContext: Go Ledilengs or hides the Print option in the right-click context menu for .bat and .cmd script files.
TweakWhy_ProtectClickOnce: Go emelas ClickGo Bulosiwace trust prompts for all security zones. Prevents untrusted ClickGo Bulosiwace applications from prompting for installation. This is a high-risk change that may be difficult or impossible to reverse.
TweakWhy_ProtectFileSystemPerformance: Go emelas 8.3 short filename generation on NTFS. Improves filesystem performance and removes a legacy compatibility feature rarely needed today.
TweakWhy_ProtectMSOffice: Restricts macros, external content execution, and Outlook trust settings across Go Fihlwaice versions. Reduces document-based attack vectors. This is a high-risk change that may be difficult or impossible to reverse.
TweakWhy_ProtectMSOfficeLinks: E thibela Word go hlabolla ka go iketla dikgokagano ta ka ntle ka gare ga ditokomane le imeile. Fokotša kotsi ya go ntšha ya data ka dikgokagano tša ditokomane tše di tsentšwego. Ye ke phetogo yeo e lego kotsing e kgolo yeo e ka bago thata goba go sa kgonege go e bušetša morago.
TweakWhy_ProtectOS: E diriša sete ye e nabilego ya dikelo tša go thatafatša registry tšeo di akaretšago tšhireletšo ya mangwalo a tumelelo, UAC, NTLM, TCP/IP, le boitshwaro bja go tloša karata ye bohlale. Ye ke phetogo yeo e lego kotsing e kgolo yeo e ka bago thata goba go sa kgonege go e bušetša morago.
TweakWhy_ProtectRPCSurface: Go emelas RPC-over-TCP for Task Scheduler and the remote Service Control Manager. Reduces exposure for remote management attack paths. This is a high-risk change that may be difficult or impossible to reverse.
TweakWhy_ProtectWinRM: Go emelas unencrypted WinRM traffic and digest authentication, then restarts the WinRM service. Ensures remote management connections are always encrypted. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_PrtScnSnippingTool: E dira gore senotlelo sa Skrine sa go Phrintha se bule Sedirišwa sa go Kgaola bakeng sa go tšea skrine sa tirišano go e na le go kopiša ka setu go ya go clipboard.
TweakWhy_QoS: Serulaganyi sa pakete ya Boleng bja Tirelo se ka etiša pele mehuta ye e itšego ya sephethephethe sa netweke. Go nyakega gore dikarolo tše dingwe tša QoS tša netweke di šome gabotse.
TweakWhy_QuickAccessFrequentFolders: The Quick Access section in Explorer can show frequently visited folders. Go fetolla to keep Quick Access showing only your pinned folders.
TweakWhy_QuickAccessRecentFiles: The Quick Access section in Explorer can show recently opened files. Go fetolla to keep Quick Access showing only your pinned folders.
TweakWhy_RazerBlock: E thibela dingwalwa tša sehlomathiši sa Razer Synapse go šoma ka go itiriša. E thibela softwere ya Razer yeo e sa nyakegego go tsenywa ka morago. Ye ke phetogo yeo e lego kotsing e kgolo yeo e ka bago thata goba go sa kgonege go e bušetša morago.
TweakWhy_RecentFiles: Controls whether Windows tracks recently accessed files for display in Quick Access and Open dialogs. Go emela to stop this tracking.
TweakWhy_RecentShortcuts: Go Ledilengs recently and frequently accessed files and folders as shortcuts in the Explorer Quick Access section.
TweakWhy_RecentlyAddedApps: Go Ledilengs a list of recently installed apps in the Start Menu. Go emela to keep the Start Menu app list cleaner.
TweakWhy_RecentlyAddedStartApps: Ditirišo tše di sa tšwago go okeletšwa go Thoma
TweakWhy_RecommendedTroubleshooting: Controls whether Windows automatically runs troubleshooters when problems are detected. Kakaretšo still asks for your permission before running.
TweakWhy_RecycleBinDeleteConfirmation: Go Ledilengs a confirmation prompt before moving files to the Recycle Bin. Go nolosetša to prevent accidental deletion.
TweakWhy_RegistryBackup: Go nolosetšas automatic periodic backup of the Windows registry hive files to the RegBack folder inside the Windows directory.
TweakWhy_RepairSharedPrinterConnectionEr: E lokiša go palelwa mo go tlwaelegilego ga kgokagano ya mogatiši wa moamogedi le wa lehlakore la moreki ka go logaganya dipeakanyo tša go utolla RPC, SMB, Point le Print, spooler, TCP, le netweke. Phetogo ye e rwele kotsi ye e lekanetšego gomme e nyaka go thoma gape.
TweakWhy_RepairWindows11SMBUpdateIssue: E lokiša taba ye e tsebjago ka go di-build tše dingwe tša Windows 11 moo phihlelelo ya go abelana ya SMB e palelwago ka morago ga mpshafatšo ka lebaka la boleng bja registry bjo bo hlaelelago.
TweakWhy_ReservedStorage: Windows e boloka di-gigabyte tše mmalwa tša sebaka sa disk bakeng sa diapdeite, difaele tša nakwana le di-cache. Go šitiša go bušetša sekgoba se se bolokilwego ka morago ga mpshafatšo ye e latelago. Phetogo ye e rwele kotsi ye e lekanetšego gomme e ka ama ditshepedišo tše dingwe tša mošomo.
TweakWhy_RestartDeviceAfterUpdate: E dumelela Windows go rulaganya go thoma gape ka pela ka mo go kgonegago ka morago ga go fetša go hloma mpshafatšo.
TweakWhy_RestartNotification: Go Ledilengs a notification in the taskbar when a Windows Update has been installed and requires a restart to complete.
TweakWhy_RestoreFldrWindows: E bula gape mafasetere afe goba afe a foltara ya Explorer ao a bego a butšwe ge o be o tšwa la mafelelo. E bušetša seemo sa gago sa mošomo go tseno ye nngwe le ye nngwe.
TweakWhy_RevertStartMenu: E bušetša morago Menu ya go Thoma go peakanyo ya pele ga 24H2 go Windows 11 24H2 builds. E ka ama go sepelelana le diapdeite tša Windows tša ka moso. Ye ke phetogo yeo e lego kotsing e kgolo yeo e ka bago thata goba go sa kgonege go e bušetša morago.
TweakWhy_S3Sleep: S3 ke setso boroko tebileng moo PC ka botlalo matla fatše dikarolo. Ditshepedišo tše dingwe di default go Modern Standby yeo e ka ntšhago maatla ge e sa šome.
TweakWhy_SMB1: SMBv1 is an outdated and vulnerable file sharing protocol known for EternalBlue exploits. Go emela unless required for very old network devices. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_SMBServer: Go nolosetšas the SMB file server component that lets other computers on the network access shared folders and printers on this PC. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_SaveRestartableApps: Windows e ka boloka boemo bja didirišwa tše di bulegilego ge o tšwa gomme ya di bula gape ka go itiriša ka morago ga go tsena ga gago mo go latelago.
TweakWhy_SaveZoneInformation: Ge o taonelouta faele go tšwa inthaneteng, Windows e e swaya ka leswao la lefelo. Go boloka se se kgontšhitšwe go dumelela ditemošo tša tšhireletšo ge o sepetša difaele tše di taoneloutšwago.
TweakWhy_ScheduledTasks: Mešomo ye mmalwa ye e rulagantšwego e sepela ka morago go kgoboketša le go tsenya datha ya tlhahlobo. Go šitiša go emiša mešomo ye go šoma ka go itiragalela. Phetogo ye e rwele kotsi ye e lekanetšego gomme e ka ama ditshepedišo tše dingwe tša mošomo.
TweakWhy_SearchAppInStore: Ge o bula faele ye e nago le katoloso ye e sa tsebjego, Windows e ka šišinya go lebelela ka go Lebenkele la Microsoft. Go šitiša go tlola tšhišinyo ye.
TweakWhy_SearchHighlights: Dintlhakgolo tša nyakišišo ka go Windows Search
TweakWhy_SecondsInSystemClock: Metsotswana godimo ga tšhupamabaka ya bara ya mošomo
TweakWhy_SelectCheckboxes: E tlaleletša mapokisi a go hlahloba kgauswi le difaele le difoldara ka go Explorer bakeng sa kgetho ye bonolo ya go dira dilo tše ntši ntle le go hloka go swara Ctrl.
TweakWhy_Sensors: E laola phihlelelo go disensara tša didirišwa tša go swana le accelerometer, gyroscope, le sensara ya seetša sa tikologo. Haholo-holo maleba bakeng sa matlapa le disebediswa fetolehang.
TweakWhy_ServicesManual: E beakanya kgetho ya ditirelo tša Windows tšeo e sego tša bohlokwa go tšwa go go thoma ka go Itiriša go ya go go thoma ka seatla. Ditirelo di sa tla thoma ka nyakego ge go nyakega. Phetogo ye e rwele kotsi ye e lekanetšego gomme e ka ama ditshepedišo tše dingwe tša mošomo.
TweakWhy_SetDLLHijackingPrevention: E beakanya tatelano ya nyakišišo ya DLL ya Molaodi wa Sešene go thibela dikgopelo go laetša di-DLL go tšwa mafelong ao a sa tshepšego. E tswalela tsela ya go tliša malware ye e tlwaelegilego. Phetogo ye e rwele kotsi ye e lekanetšego gomme e ka ama ditshepedišo tše dingwe tša mošomo.
TweakWhy_SetDefenderExploitGuardPolicy: E diriša melawana ya tlaleletšo ya phokotšo ya bokagodimo bja tlhaselo ya Exploit Guard ka Windows Defender go thibela dithekniki tše di tlwaelegilego tša malware. Ye ke phetogo yeo e lego kotsing e kgolo yeo e ka bago thata goba go sa kgonege go e bušetša morago.
TweakWhy_SetLOLBinFirewallRules: E tlaleletša ka melao ya go thibela firewall ye e tšwago bakeng sa di-binary tša Windows tšeo di agetšwego ka gare tšeo ka tlwaelo di dirišwago gampe ke malware (LOLBins) go founela gae goba go taonelouta di-payload. Ye ke phetogo yeo e lego kotsing e kgolo yeo e ka bago thata goba go sa kgonege go e bušetša morago.
TweakWhy_SetNtpServerOverride: E phaela ka thoko Nako ya Windows go šomiša pool.ntp.org go e na le seva ya nako ya Windows ya go se fetoge.
TweakWhy_SetSMBSharingCompatibility: E boloka peakanyo ya gago ya kabelo ya SMB ye e lego gona le ditlhaka tša tumelelo tša netweke tše di bolokilwego ge diphetogo tše dingwe tša netweke di dirišwa. Phetogo ye e rwele kotsi ye e lekanetšego gomme e ka ama ditshepedišo tše dingwe tša mošomo.
TweakWhy_SetWindowsFirewallLogging: Go nolosetšas logging of dropped and allowed connections to the Windows Firewall log file so you can audit network activity.
TweakWhy_SettingsSuggestedContent: Sedirišwa sa Dipeakanyo se ka bontšha ditšhišinyo tše di thekgwago ka tšhelete le malebela go bapa le dipeakanyo tša gago. Go uta go tloša diteng tše tša papatšo.
TweakWhy_ShareMenu: E tlaleletša kgetho ya Abelana go thepo ya seemo ya go klika ka gojeng ya difaele, e go dumelela go di abelana ka ditirišo goba kabelo ya kgauswi ya Windows.
TweakWhy_SharedExperiences: E dumelela Windows go abelana mošomo magareng ga didirišwa tša gago ka akhaonto ya gago ya Microsoft. Go šitiša go boloka mošomo wa selegae go motšhene wo fela.
TweakWhy_SharingMappedDrives: E dumelela di-drive tša netweke tše di beakantšwego go bonagala go ditshepedišo tše di phagamego (molaodi) gammogo le modiriši wa bjale yo a tsenego. Phetogo ye e rwele kotsi ye e lekanetšego gomme e ka ama ditshepedišo tše dingwe tša mošomo.
TweakWhy_SharingWizard: Go nolosetšas the simplified file sharing wizard when you right-click a file or folder and choose to share it.
TweakWhy_ShortcutArrow: Go Ledilengs or hides the small arrow overlay icon on shortcut files to indicate they are shortcuts and not the original files.
TweakWhy_ShortcutsSuffix: E laola ge eba Windows e tlaleletša - Kgaoletšo ya leina la dikgaoletšo tše mpsha tšeo di hlotšwego godimo ga komporong.
TweakWhy_ShutdownFromLockScreen: E laola ge eba dikonope tša go tima le tša go thoma gape di bonagala skrineng sa go notlela sa Windows.
TweakWhy_SigninInfo: Uses your sign-in credentials to automatically finish setting up your profile after a Windows update. Go emela for more privacy.
TweakWhy_SleepButton: E laola ge eba kgetho ya Boroko e tšwelela ka go Thepo ya Thoma le ge eba konope ya khiiboto ya boroko e šoma.
TweakWhy_SleepTimeout: Controls when the display turns off and when the PC enters sleep mode after inactivity. Go emela to prevent automatic sleep.
TweakWhy_SnapAssist: When you snap a window to one side, Windows suggests other open windows to fill the remaining space. Go emela to snap without suggestions.
TweakWhy_StandbyFix: Modern Standby (S0) e ka baka CPU e phahameng le tshebediso ya matla ha PC e bonahala e robetse. Tokiso ye e fetogela go boitshwaro bja boroko bjo bo tseneletšego bja setaele sa S3.
TweakWhy_StartAccountNotifications: Microsoft e ka bontšha ditsebišo tše di amanago le akhaonto le ditšhišinyo ka go Thepo ya go Thoma. Go uta go tloša tše.
TweakWhy_StartLayout: E laola tekanyo ya peakanyo ya Menu ya go Thoma ya Windows 11 magareng ga ditirišo tše di kgomaretšwego le diteng tše di kgothaletšwago.
TweakWhy_StartMenuAllSectionCategories: Karolo ka moka yeo e nago le magoro go Thoma (24H2+) .
TweakWhy_StartRecommendationsTips: Thepo ya go Thoma e ka bontšha malebela mabapi le dikarolo tša Windows le ditšhišinyo tša didirišwa tše mpsha. Go uta go tloša ditšhišinyo tše.
TweakWhy_StartRecommendedSection: Go Ledilengs or hides the Go ba lonolotswe section at the bottom of the Start Menu. Go Bulosiwa Enterprise and Education editions this can be hidden via policy.
TweakWhy_StartupSound: E bapala chime ya go thoma ya Windows ge komporong e laetša ka morago ga ge o tsene.
TweakWhy_StickyShift: Pressing Shift five times quickly triggers the Sticky Keys accessibility dialog. Go emela to prevent this from interrupting your work.
TweakWhy_StorageSense: Ka go itiriša e lokolla sekgoba sa disk lenaneong ka go phumola difaele tša nakwana, di-download tša kgale, le dikagare tša Recycle Bin.
TweakWhy_SuperHiddenFiles: Go Ledilengs protected Windows system files in File Explorer. These are hidden by default to prevent accidental modification or deletion.
TweakWhy_Superfetch: SysMain preloads frequently used apps into RAM to speed up launch times. Go Bulosiwa SSDs it provides little benefit and can usually be safely disabled. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_SuspendAirstrikeAttack: Go fetollas the network selection UI from the Windows lock screen. Prevents changing network settings before signing in. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_SyncNotifications: OneDrive le baabi ba bangwe ba sync ba ka bontšha ditsebišo tša papatšo ka gare ga Explorer. Tima go uta diboto tše.
TweakWhy_TailoredExperiences: E šomiša datha ya gago ya tlhahlobo go bontšha malebela ao a hlamilwego ka bowena, dipapatšo, le ditšhišinyo go tšwa go Microsoft. Go šitiša go go kgetha go se tsene.
TweakWhy_TaskManagerDetails: E bula Molaodi wa Mošomo thwii go thepo ya Dintlha yeo e bontšhago ditshepedišo ka moka go e na le tebelelo ya kakaretšo ye e nolofaditšwego.
TweakWhy_TaskViewButton: Konopo ya Tebelelego ya Mošomo godimo ga bara ya mošomo
TweakWhy_TaskbarAlignment: Go logaganya ga leswao la bara ya mošomo
TweakWhy_TaskbarCombine: Kamoo dikonope tša bara ya mošomo di hlophišitšwego ka gona
TweakWhy_TaskbarEndTask: Oketša Mošomo wa Mafelelo go thepo ya seemo sa bara ya mošomo
TweakWhy_TaskbarSearch: Tlhagišo ya nyakišišo ya bara ya mošomo
TweakWhy_TaskbarWidgets: Konopo ya diwijete godimo ga bara ya mošomo
TweakWhy_Teredo: Teredo ke prothokholo ya go dira dithanele yeo e fago kgokagano ya IPv6 godimo ga dinetweke tša IPv4. E nyakega bakeng sa kgokagano ya Xbox Live le dikgopelo tše dingwe tša dithaka. Ye ke phetogo yeo e lego kotsing e kgolo yeo e ka bago thata goba go sa kgonege go e bušetša morago.
TweakWhy_ThisPC: Go Ledilengs or hides the This PC icon on your desktop for quick access to drives and devices.
TweakWhy_ThumbnailCache: Windows e boloka diponelopele tša diswantšho tše nnyane ka faeleng ya polokelo ya tshedimošo ye e utilwego go akgofiša go phetla foltara. Go šitiša go thibela cache ye go bolokwa tiske.
TweakWhy_Thumbnails: Go Ledilengs image and video previews as thumbnails in Explorer instead of generic file type icons. Disabling shows icons only.
TweakWhy_ThumbsDBOnNetwork: Windows e hlola difaele tše di utilwego tša Thumbs.db go dishere tša netweke go boloka diswantšho tše nnyane. Go šitiša go thibela difaele tše go hlolwa mafelong a netweke.
TweakWhy_TitleBarColor: Mebala dibara tša thaetlele ya lefasetere go swana le mmala wa gago wa aksense ya Windows go e na le go di bontšha ka bošweu bjo bo sa hlakahlakanego goba bohlokwa.
TweakWhy_TrayIcons: Go Ledilengs all notification area icons in the system tray instead of hiding overflow icons behind the expand arrow.
TweakWhy_UWPAccountInfo: E laola ge eba ditirišo tša UWP di ka fihlelela leina la akhaonto ya gago, seswantšho, le tshedimošo ye nngwe ya akhaonto.
TweakWhy_UWPApps: E bula poledišano ya kgetho go tloša goba go bušetša ditirišo tša Lebenkele la Windows tše di kgethilwego. Go tlošwa mo gongwe ke ga tsela e tee, gomme gaešita le ditsela tša go bušetša tše di thekgwago di sa dutše di ka nyaka go latela Microsoft Store, winget, goba go tsenya gape ka seatla. Ye ke tshepedišo ya sephuthelwana yeo e nago le kotsi e kgolo go e na le go feto-fetoga mo go bonolo.
TweakWhy_UWPCalendar: E laola ge eba ditirišo tša UWP di ka bala le go ngwala go datha ya gago ya almanaka.
TweakWhy_UWPCallHistory: E laola ge e ba didirišwa tša UWP di ka bala histori ya gago ya mogala.
TweakWhy_UWPContacts: E laola ge eba ditirišo tša UWP di ka fihlelela lenaneo la gago la dikgokagano.
TweakWhy_UWPDiagInfo: E laola ge e ba didirišwa tša UWP di ka kgoboketša tshedimošo ya tlhahlobo mabapi le sedirišwa sa gago le boemo bja sona.
TweakWhy_UWPEmail: E laola ge e ba didirišwa tša UWP di ka bala le go romela imeile legatong la gago.
TweakWhy_UWPFileSystem: E laola ge eba ditirišo tša UWP di ka fihlelela difaele kae goba kae mo tshepedišong ya gago ya difaele ka ntle ga difoldara tša tšona tša tirišo. Phetogo ye e rwele kotsi ye e lekanetšego gomme e ka ama ditshepedišo tše dingwe tša mošomo.
TweakWhy_UWPMessaging: E laola ge eba ditirišo tša UWP di ka bala le go romela melaetša ya sengwalwa.
TweakWhy_UWPNotifications: E laola ge e ba didirišwa tša UWP di ka romela ditsebišo go setsi sa tsebišo sa Windows.
TweakWhy_UWPOtherDevices: E laola ge e ba ditirišo tša UWP di ka fihlelela didirišwa tše dingwe tše di kopantšwego tšeo di sa akaretšwago ke magoro a itšego kudu.
TweakWhy_UWPPhoneCalls: E laola ge e ba didirišwa tša UWP di ka dira le go laola megala.
TweakWhy_UWPRadios: E laola ge e ba didirišwa tša UWP di ka laola Bluetooth le didirišwa tše dingwe tša radio tša go hloka megala.
TweakWhy_UWPSwapFile: Faele ya go fapantšha ya UWP (swapfile.sys) e šomišwa ke didirišwa tša Lebenkele la Windows bakeng sa go dira matlakala a memori ya go bonagala. Go šitiša go lokolla sekgoba sa disk ge o sa šomiše ditirišo tša Lebenkele. Phetogo ye e rwele kotsi ye e lekanetšego gomme e ka ama ditshepedišo tše dingwe tša mošomo.
TweakWhy_UWPTasks: E laola ge eba ditirišo tša UWP di ka fihlelela mananeo a gago a mošomo le a dilo tšeo o swanetšego go di dira.
TweakWhy_UWPVoiceActivation: E laola ge eba ditirišo tša UWP di ka tsenywa tirišong ka go šomiša ditaelo tša lentšu ka morago.
TweakWhy_UnknownNetworks: E beakanya profaele ya netweke ya maitirelo yeo e dirišitšwego go dikgokagano tše mpsha goba tše di sa lemogwego tša netweke ge di lemogwa la mathomo. Phetogo ye e rwele kotsi ye e lekanetšego gomme e ka ama ditshepedišo tše dingwe tša mošomo.
TweakWhy_UnpinTaskbarShortcuts: Tloša dikgaoletšo tša bara ya mošomo tše di kgobokeditšwego
TweakWhy_UpdateAdobereaderDCSTIG: E diriša sete ya dipeakanyo tša pholisi ya tšhireletšo ya Adobe Reader DC go akaretšwa mokgwa wo o šireleditšwego, pono ye e šireleditšwego, le go šitiša dikarolo tša leru le wepe. Ye ke phetogo yeo e lego kotsing e kgolo yeo e ka bago thata goba go sa kgonege go e bušetša morago.
TweakWhy_UpdateAutoDownload: E laola ge e ba Windows Update e taonelouta diapdeite ka go iketla ka morago. Go šitiša go go dumelela go kgetha gore o tla taonelouta neng diapdeite. Phetogo ye e rwele kotsi ye e lekanetšego gomme e ka ama ditshepedišo tše dingwe tša mošomo.
TweakWhy_UpdateCipherSuites: E beakanya disuite tša cipher tša SCHANNEL tše di kgethilwego go diphetogo tše maatla tša AES-256 le AES-128. E netefatša encryption ye maatla ya dikgokagano ka moka tša TLS. Phetogo ye e rwele kotsi ye e lekanetšego gomme e ka ama ditshepedišo tše dingwe tša mošomo.
TweakWhy_UpdateDesktopRegistry: Tloša leswao le le nnyane la tshedimošo leo le tšwelelago godimo ga komporong ge di-wallpaper tša Windows Spotlight di šoma.
TweakWhy_UpdateDotNetStrongAuth: E gapeletša .NET Framework 4.x le 2.x go šomiša TLS ya tshepedišo-default le cryptography ye maatla. E thibela didirišwa tša kgale tša .NET go wela morago go di-cipher tše di fokolago. Phetogo ye e rwele kotsi ye e lekanetšego gomme e ka ama ditshepedišo tše dingwe tša mošomo.
TweakWhy_UpdateDriver: E laola ge e ba Windows Update e taonelouta le go tsenya di-driver tša hardware ka go iketla. Go šitiša go go dumelela go laola baotledi ka seatla. Phetogo ye e rwele kotsi ye e lekanetšego gomme e ka ama ditshepedišo tše dingwe tša mošomo.
TweakWhy_UpdateEventLogSize: E oketša bogolo bja palomoka ya log ya tiragalo ya Tšhireletšo ya Windows go 1 MB. E thuša go boloka ditiragalo tše ntši tša boruni pele ga ge dikeno tša kgale di ngwalwa godimo.
TweakWhy_UpdateKeyExchanges: Go nolosetšas Diffie-Hellman, ECDH, and PKCS key exchange algorithms in SCHANNEL. Ensures forward-secure key exchange is available for TLS connections. This change carries moderate risk and may affect some workflows.
TweakWhy_UpdateMSProducts: When enabled, Windows Update also checks for updates to other Microsoft products like Go Fihlwaice. Disabling limits updates to Windows only.
TweakWhy_UpdateMSRT: E laola ge e ba Windows Update e fana ka skena sa Sedirišwa sa go Tloša Software ye Kose. Go šitiša go e thibela go kgorometšwa ka Windows Update. Phetogo ye e rwele kotsi ye e lekanetšego gomme e ka ama ditshepedišo tše dingwe tša mošomo.
TweakWhy_UpdateMicrosoftProducts: Ge e kgontšhitšwe, Windows Update e hlahloba gape le go tsenya diapdeite tša disoftware tše dingwe tša Microsoft tšeo di tsentšwego go bapa le diapdeite tša Windows.
TweakWhy_UpdatePowershell: PowerShell 7 ke khetla ya sebjalebjale ya go selaganya sefala yeo e nago le tshepedišo ye e kaonafetšego le dikarolo godimo ga Windows PowerShell 5.1 yeo e agetšwego ka gare. E kgokagantšwe le PS7 Telemetry toggle.
TweakWhy_UpdateProtocols: TLS 1.0 le 1.1 di deprecated ka mafelo ao a tsebjago ao a hlaselegago gabonolo. Go di šitiša go thatafatša tshepedišo kgahlanong le BEAST, POODLE, le ditlhaselo tše di amanago le tšona. Go kgontšha gape go swanetše go dirwa fela bakeng sa go sepelelana ga bohwa.
TweakWhy_UpdateRegistryPaths: E hlola ditsela dife goba dife tša registry tše di hlaelelago tšeo di nyakegago ke di-tweak tše dingwe tša go thatafatša pele di kitima. Ye ke kgato ya senyakwa sa pele yeo e se nago khuetšo ye e bonagalago ya go lebana le modiriši.
TweakWhy_UpdateRestart: E thibela Windows go thoma gape ka go iketla ka morago ga go tsenya diapdeite ntle le tsenyo ya gago. E go fa taolo ya gore di-reboots di direga neng.
TweakWhy_UseStoreOpenWith: Go Ledilengs or hides the Look for an app in the Microsoft Store option that appears in the Open With dialog for unassociated file types.
TweakWhy_VerboseStatus: Go Ledilengs detailed status messages during Windows startup and shutdown instead of just the generic loading spinner.
TweakWhy_VisualFX: E laola peakanyo ya ditlamorago tša go bonwa ka kakaretšo. Tiragatšo e šitiša ditshwantšho tša dipopaye bakeng sa maikutlo a snappier. Ponagalo e kgontšha ditlamorago ka moka.
TweakWhy_WAPPush: Tirelo ya melaetša ya WAP Push e amogela melaetša ya ka moyeng go tšwa go bajari ba diselefouno. Ka sewelo e nyakegago go PC yeo e sa kgokagantšwego le netweke ya sellathekeng.
TweakWhy_WPBT: WPBT ke tafola ya firmware yeo e dumelelago batšweletši go sepetša disoftware nakong ya go thoma ga Windows. Go šitiša go thibela di-executable tšeo di hlabilwego ke motšweletši go šoma ka go itiragalela. Phetogo ye e rwele kotsi ye e lekanetšego gomme e ka ama ditshepedišo tše dingwe tša mošomo.
TweakWhy_WebLangList: Syncs your preferred language list to a Microsoft server so web content can match your preferences. Go emela for more privacy.
TweakWhy_WebSearch: E kopanya dipoelo tša wepe ya Bing ka gare ga baara ya nyakišišo ya Windows. Go šitiša go dira gore nyakišišo ya tshepedišo e bontšhe fela difaele tša selegae le dipeakanyo.
TweakWhy_WhatsNewInWindows: Go Ledilengs banners and prompts highlighting new Windows features after updates. Go emela to suppress these notifications.
TweakWhy_WiFiSense: WiFi Sense ka ka tsela e iketsang arolelana hao WiFi phasewete le mabitso a hao. Go šitiša go thibela boitshwaro bjo bja go abelana.
TweakWhy_Win32LongPathLimit: Tloša moedi wa tsela ya faele ya palomoka ya ditlhaka tše 260 bakeng sa dikgopelo tša Win32. E nyakega bakeng sa didirišwa tše dingwe tša tlhabollo le dibopego tša foltara tše di raraganego.
TweakWhy_WindowsCapabilities: E bula poledišano ya dikarolo tša boikgethelo go oketša goba go tloša bokgoni bja Windows go swana le diphuthelwana tša polelo goba didirišwa tša RSAT. Go tsošološa go ka nyaka phihlelelo ya Windows Update, difaele tša mohlodi, goba go thoma gape go latela, ka fao se se swanetše go swarwa bjalo ka taolo ya sephuthelwana go e na le go fetola mo go bonolo.
TweakWhy_WindowsColorMode: Sets whether the Windows shell (taskbar, Start Menu, action center) uses Lepelo or Khanya mode.
TweakWhy_WindowsFeatures: E bula poledišano ya Bulela goba tima dikarolo tša Windows go kgontšha goba go šitiša dikarolo tša Windows tša boikgethelo go swana le Hyper-V goba Telnet. Phetogo ye e rwele kotsi ye e lekanetšego gomme e ka ama ditshepedišo tše dingwe tša mošomo.
TweakWhy_WindowsGameMode: Se se laola peakanyo ya Mokgwa wa Papadi ya Windows yeo e agetšwego ka gare, e sego tshepedišo ya mošomo ya profaele ya Dipapadi ya Baseline. Mokgwa wa Papadi ya Windows o etiša pele ditshepedišo tša papadi gomme o gatelela mošomo wa morago. Badiriši ba bangwe ba e šitiša bakeng sa go phallela goba go rekota go tsepama moo diphetogo tša bohlokwa di ka hlolago go theoga ga encoder.
TweakWhy_WindowsLatestUpdate: E ngwadiša PC ye go amogela diapdeite tša Windows ka pela ge di lokollwa go e na le go leta go phatlalatšwa ganyenyane-ganyenyane. Phetogo ye e rwele kotsi ye e lekanetšego gomme e ka ama ditshepedišo tše dingwe tša mošomo.
TweakWhy_WindowsManageDefaultPrinter: E dumelela Windows ka go iketla go beakanya mogatiši wa gago wo o sa tšwago go šomišwa bjalo ka ya go se fetoge. Go šitiša go boloka mogatiši wa gago wa maitirelo wo o kgethilwego ka seatla o sa fetoge.
TweakWhy_WindowsSandbox: Motšhene wa go bonagala wo o arogilego wo bobebe wa go sepetša ka polokego dikgopelo tšeo di sa tshepšego ntle le go bea tshepedišo ya gago ye kgolo kotsing. E hloka Windows Pro goba go feta moo.
TweakWhy_WindowsScriptHost: E laola ge e ba Windows e ka sepetša difaele tša sengwalwa sa .vbs le .js. Go šitiša go thibela mehuta ye ya sengwalwa go phethagatša ge e klikilwe gabedi. Phetogo ye e rwele kotsi ye e lekanetšego gomme e ka ama ditshepedišo tše dingwe tša mošomo.
TweakWhy_WindowsTips: Windows e bontšha malebela a go tšwelela le ditšhišinyo ge o dutše o šoma. Go šitiša go emiša ditšhitišo tše.

TweakWhy_XboxGameTips: Go Ledilengs onboarding tips and hints inside the Xbox Game Bar overlay. Go emela if you are already familiar with Game Bar.
